     The Numbers Business Report

Transformers: Rise of the Beasts (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $157,341,749Details
International Box Office $281,900,000
Worldwide Box Office $439,241,749
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $4,323,430
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $6,703,356
Total $11,026,786
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Returning to the action and spectacle that have captured moviegoers around the world, Transformers: Rise of the Beasts will take audiences on a ‘90s globetrotting adventure with the Autobots and introduce a whole new breed of Transformer – the Maximals – to the existing battle on earth between Autobots and Decepticons.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$61,045,464 (38.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.58 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:35.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$195,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,678 opening theaters/3,680 max. theaters, 5.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $172,011,638

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 9th, 2023 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
June 9th, 2023 (IMAX) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: June 6th, 2023 (Wide), released as Transformers: Rise of the Beasts (트랜스포머-비스트의 서막) (South Korea)
June 7th, 2023 (Wide), released as Transformers: Il Risveglio (Italy)
June 7th, 2023 (Wide), released as Transformers: El Despertar De Las Bestias (Colombia)
June 7th, 2023 (Wide) (Philippines)
June 7th, 2023 (Wide), released as Transformers: Rise of the Beasts (變形金剛：萬獸崛起) (Taiwan)
Video Release: July 11th, 2023 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of sci-fi action and violence, and language.
(Rating bulletin 2785 (cert #54226), 5/31/2023)
Running Time: 127 minutes
Franchise: Transformers
Cast, crew, or production detail: Live Action Remake, Prequel
Filming location (city or town): Los Angeles, CA, New York, NY
Filming location (country): Canada, Iceland, Peru, United States
Filming location (state or county): New Mexico, United States
Plot point: Robot
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Time period setting: 1990s
Source:Based on TV
Genre:Action
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Entertainment One, Hasbro Studios, Paramount Animation, Skydance Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Returning to the action and spectacle that have captured moviegoers around the world, Transformers: Rise of the Beasts will take audiences on a ‘90s globetrotting adventure with the Autobots and introduce a whole new breed of Transformer – the Maximals – to the existing battle on earth between Autobots and Decepticons.
